# re-test results: v1 (mapping-gated) vs v2 (seeding) - generated, do not edit

identical draws per matched run, so distance is controlled by design; the only variable is skill text.

## primary: structural genuineness, v2 vs v1 (paired by problem)

mean v2 5.74 vs v1 4.93; paired mean diff **0.81** (95% ci 0.60 to 1.03); exact wilcoxon p = 0.0020; band: **v2 > v1**; pre-registered prediction (diff >= +0.5): **met** (n pairs = 10).

fabrication (outputs with >=1 flag): v1 0/30, v2 0/30 (must stay flat or fall).

abstentions: v1 0, v2 0.
draw distance: controlled by design (v1 and v2 received identical wildcards per matched run).

## reliability

krippendorff alpha (ordinal): genuineness 0.59, usefulness 0.66, novelty 0.63, nonDerailment -0.01.
